description: A ground-level photograph of an agricultural landscape, featuring a vineyard on a gentle slope. Rows of young, green grapevines are planted in the foreground and midground, with dry, brown soil visible between them. In the background, a hillside is covered with numerous olive trees and patches of green vegetation, indicative of a Mediterranean climate. The sky above is blue with scattered white cumulus clouds. The grapevines show fresh spring or early summer growth.
